markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the content workflow to accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Goal:** Launch the first article next week to build momentum and catch up on the original 20–30 article plan.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** A weekly cadence is set: Growth X delivers drafts by Wednesday → Udemy reviews by the following Tuesday → Growth X applies edits by Thursday → Udemy publishes by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Content Delivery:** Growth X will send Slack notifications with Google Doc links and Content OS links. Jay will learn to use the Content OS (Airtable) for direct management.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [**Analytics:** GA4/GSC access is blocked by a required Data Protection Agreement (DPA). Access is needed to build Looker dashboards and monitor LLM citations via Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

## Topics

### Publishing Urgency & Blockers

  - [**Goal:** Publish the first article next week to build momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The project is behind schedule; the original plan aimed for 20–30 articles by now.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Final edits on the "recalibration" articles are pending from Steve (Udemy).](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Deadline:** EOD Friday, Nov 7.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [**Impact:** Edits received by 2–3 PM Friday enable same-day application; otherwise, edits will be applied Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

### Content Delivery & Workflow

  - [**New Weekly Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Wed (EOD):** Growth X delivers new drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Next Tue:** Udemy provides all revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Next Thu (noon):** Growth X applies edits.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Next Fri:** Udemy publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**Content Delivery Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [**Initial:** Growth X sends Slack notifications with Google Doc links and Content OS (Airtable) links.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [**Transition:** Jay (Udemy) will learn to use the Content OS for direct management.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [**Access:** A shared link for the Content OS will be provided to simplify onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Publishing Location:**](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [Articles will be posted in the "Resource Center" for now.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Awaiting the "Skill Shift" page launch. Justin will discuss with dev/design tomorrow how to manage the display of these articles to avoid burying acquisition team content.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### Analytics & Reporting

  - [**Blocker:** GA4 and GSC access is required for analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - [**Status:** Justin has an IT ticket open.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - [**Requirement:** A Data Protection Agreement (DPA) may be needed from Growth X.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [**Planned Dashboards (Post-Access):**](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Looker:** Standard performance dashboards (GA4/GSC data).](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Scrunch:** LLM citation monitoring (citations, sentiment, competitor analysis).](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [**Required Inputs:** Growth X will provide a list of prompts needed to build the Scrunch dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Justin (Udemy):**](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Ensure Steve delivers final edits for "recalibration" articles by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Follow up with IT on the GA4/GSC access ticket and DPA requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - [Meet with dev/design tomorrow to discuss the "Skill Shift" page wireframe.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Katya (Growth X):**](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Deliver new drafts for "AI employee training program" and two others by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Apply "recalibration" article edits upon receipt, prioritizing Friday application.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [Send weekly Slack notifications with article links and Content OS links.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [Provide a shared link for Jay to access the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [Create and share a list of prompts needed for Scrunch dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/5mZrneEy6vq_EoBxrCycrZ9eDYF8WJWP?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
